title: Jaidev Library
description: A Library for my mods to simplify some coding and reuse content.
body:
## What Does the Library Do?
> This library is used for my mods and is mainly designed to make it easier to register or add content such as blocks, items and more

### Features:
- Easily register items, blocks, entity attributes, item groups and more


## Documentation
> [View the documentation](https://sites.google.com/view/jaidev-library/jaidev-library) - still under development, so some sections may be missing
>
